title: SafeCircle — Parental Control Platform
description: Comprehensive parental control ecosystem to monitor, restrict, and manage child device telemetry and application access securely.
highlights: Implemented Apple's Family Controls, Managed Settings, and Device Activity frameworks for system-level app and website blocking
Architected background location-tracking and geofencing alert infrastructure with Core Location, optimized for minimal battery drain
Built a security module to detect active VPN connections and route remote push updates to the parent administrative app

title: PatientGO — Clinical Healthcare Platform
description: HIPAA-aligned patient engagement and clinical trial tracking with hybrid UIKit/SwiftUI architecture and real-time telehealth.
highlights: Integrated Azure Communication Services SDK for low-latency one-on-one audio and video consultations between patients and physicians
Designed state-driven eDiary modules and expense reimbursement workflows with offline-to-cloud sync via robust queue handling
Engineered secure data flows and hybrid UI patterns for regulated healthcare environments

title: JOJO OTT — Regional Video Streaming
description: High-traffic regional entertainment platform with native Events and Ticketing, dynamic reservations, and optimized media playback.
highlights: Architected the native Events and Ticketing module with dynamic seat reservations, real-time ticket states, and secure local receipt processing
Engineered customized playback with AVFoundation—trailer previews, background audio state, and optimized asset caching
Delivered responsive layouts and backward-compatible UI for a content-heavy OTT experience

title: FanCall — Creator Engagement
description: Social platform for secure, real-time video consultations among creators, brands, and subscribers.
highlights: Built custom video call orchestration—call states, scheduling hooks, authentication, and session lifecycle management
Implemented real-time interactive commenting via WebSockets alongside REST-driven profile and booking flows
Optimized call setup and state transitions for low-latency creator–subscriber engagement

title: Andalus — Electronics E-Commerce
description: Native e-commerce app for browsing and purchasing electronics with secure checkout and modern UIKit interactions.
highlights: Structured end-to-end user flow from search and product detail through cart to checkout
Integrated secure payments with Apple Pay using the Ottu payment API
Designed polished e-commerce UI patterns—filters, wishlists, and order tracking—with UIKit
